title: 4 Pack Wall Mounted Shelve Bracket, Heavy Duty Book Shelf Bracket, for Shelves L Bracket Shelving Support Brackets (White, 25cm x 20cm)
features: [Bearing Capacity] The maximum support weight of a single metal shelf bracket is approx.30kg, it is recommended to use 2 shelf brackets. The wall L shape bracket triangle shape structure make it stable right angle.
[Durable Material] The shelf brackets are made of high quality cold rolled steel, which is bright baking varnish, surface spray treatment, rustproof and corrosion resistant.

[Easy Installation] Each corner bracket with pre-drilled screw holes can guide you through the process. Comes with complete hardware screws for quick and easy to install the l-bracket.They can be installed in almost any place on any level for a range of options.

[Wide Application] The white corner braces are perfect for DIY shelves to saving space. Could be used for any shelf install, such as bookshelf, garden shelf, table and chair corner. Suitable for home, bathroom, shop, garage and office.
[Heavy Duty Shelve Bracket] The size of the shelve bracket is approx. 25cm x 20cm (9.8inch x 7.9inch). Proper size for different usage.
description: Feature: 1. Used to build multi-purpose display shelves for small plants, toys, jewelry, frames, spice jars and books. 2. Can save the space in your home most efficiently. No need to take up any floor space. 3. The white shelf bracket can match different home styles. Specifications: Material: Cold Rolled Steel Color: White Bracket Size: 25cm x 20cm (9.8inch x 7.9inch) Package Included: 4 x White Shelf Brackets 12 x Long Screws 12 x Short Screws 12 x Expansion Tubes
